title: Masters program for Indians in Austria
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Big news for Indian STEM graduates! Austria has launched an exclusive two-year Master's pathway at top technical universities. The program is designed to give you valuable industry experience and global exposure. The best part? You get a one-year post-study visa to work in Europe after graduation! This is a powerful new bridge to a global career.
